# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric characters)"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges for network rules"
      }
    },
    "enableHttpsOnly": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enforce HTTPS traffic only"
      }
    },
    "minimumTlsVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "TLS1_2",
      "allowedValues": [
        "TLS1_2",
        "TLS1_3"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Minimum TLS version"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "blobServiceName": "default",
    "webContainerName": "$web",
    "assetsContainerName": "assets"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": "[parameters('enableHttpsOnly')]",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "[parameters('minimumTlsVersion')]",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": true,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": false,
        "defaultToOAuthAuthentication": true,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "ipRules": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), map(parameters('allowedIpAddresses'), lambda('ip', createObject('value', lambdaVariables('ip'), 'action', 'Allow'))), createArray())]"
        },
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage",
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true
        },
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/', variables('blobServiceName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "cors": {
          "corsRules": [
            {
              "allowedOrigins": [
                "*"
              ],
              "allowedMethods": [
                "GET",
                "HEAD",
                "OPTIONS"
              ],
              "maxAgeInSeconds": 3600,
              "exposedHeaders": [
                "*"
              ],
              "allowedHeaders": [
                "*"
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/', variables('blobServiceName'), '/', variables('webContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "Blob",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "static-website-hosting"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/', variables('blobServiceName'), '/', variables('assetsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServiceName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "Blob",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "website-assets"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/managementPolicies",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "policy": {
          "rules": [
            {
              "enabled": true,
              "name": "DeleteOldVersions",
              "type": "Lifecycle",
              "definition": {
                "actions": {
                  "version": {
                    "delete": {
                      "daysAfterCreationGreaterThan": 90
                    }
                  }
                },
                "filters": {
                  "blobTypes": [
                    "blockBlob"
                  ]
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    },
    "primaryEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('storageAccountId')).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    },
    "webEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('storageAccountId')).primaryEndpoints.web]"
    }
  }
}
